name: Fortune Fairy En
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>占</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うらな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> エンちゃん
desc: When you draw this card: You can reveal it; Special Summon it from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand: You can target 1 Set card your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Fortune Fairy En" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When you draw this card: You can reveal it; Special Summon it from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand: You can target 1 Set card your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Fortune Fairy En" once per turn.
eff: When you draw this card: You can reveal it; Special Summon it from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand: You can target 1 Set card your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Fortune Fairy En" once per turn.

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-down Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
